chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 455 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.1628/2026 3. For hearing of main case 10.03.2026 Mr. Manzoor Hassan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. A.G. Sindh along with SIP Aijaz, PS Civil Lines, PI Deen Muhammad on behalf of SSP Karachi South, SIP Mumtaz Ali Malik, PS Gulistan-e-Johar, SIP / SHO Asghar, PS Gulistan-e-Johar and Raza Mian, DSP Legal-II, CPO. Mr. Tahir Hussain Mangi, APG. ------------------------------------ Reports along with copies of FIRs and Challans filed by SHO Police Station Shahra-e-Faisal, and SHO PS Gulistan-e-Johar, taken on record, hands over copy of the same to learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned Addl. A.G. submits that since the cases have been challaned therefore, petitioner may avail remedy under the law and instant petition may be disposed of having become infructuous. Since the case/FIRs, subject matter of this petition, have been challaned and is now pending trial before the competent court of jurisdiction, hence in view of dicta laid down by Apex Court in case of Director General, Anti-Corruption Establishment, Lahore and others Vs. Muhammad Akram Khan and others reported as PLD 2013 SC 401, this petition has become infructuous, which is hereby dismissed as having become infructuous. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to approach the learned trial Court for redressal of his grievances, if so advised. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
